# This .gitignore file should be placed at the root of your Unity project directory

# Ignore the following directories
[Ll]ibrary/
[Tt]emp/
[Oo]bj/
[Bb]uild/
[Bb]uilds/
[Ll]ogs/
[Mm]emoryCaptures/

# Asset meta data should only be ignored when the corresponding asset is also ignored
# But generally, meta files should be included
# *.meta

# Autogenerated VS/JetBrains/Rider/VSCode files
ExportedObj/
.consulo/
*.csproj
*.unityproj
*.sln
*.suo
*.tmp
*.user
*.userprefs
*.pidb
*.booproj
*.svd
*.pdb
*.mdb
*.opendb
*.VC.db

# Unity cache
sysinfo.txt

# Builds
*.apk
*.aab
*.unitypackage

# Crash reports
CrashReport*

# Ignore Rider project files
.idea/

# Ignore VS Code settings
.vscode/

# Ignore user-specific settings
UserSettings/

# Ignore addressables
/[Aa]ssets/[Aa]ddressable[Aa]ssets[Dd]ata/*/*.bin*
/[Aa]ssets/[Aa]ddressable[Aa]ssets[Dd]ata/*/*.hash
/[Aa]ssets/[Aa]ddressable[Aa]ssets[Dd]ata/*/*.json

# Ignore generated streaming assets
/[Aa]ssets/[Ss]treamingAssets/aa/*
